text: I feel a swirling mixture of curiosity and anticipation. The glass-walled room filled with people suggests a space of collective inquiry, perhaps a seminar or workshop. Stepping out, I am greeted by a vibrant wall devoted to research and development, its bold colors and displays inviting me to reflect on human connection with intelligent machines. I am both observer and participant, standing at the convergence of knowledge and creation, slightly awed by the intentionality of this environment.
